benefits.description: Started at 260lbs, currently at 190lbs over approximately 2 years on tirzepatide

protocol_notes: On tirzepatide for 2 years. Started at 260lbs, currently 190lbs. Has been in the 190s for at least 6 months. Recently upped to 20mg/week which got them to 190. Plans to ride this through summer, then taper down and cruise at 10-15mg for life. Tried retatrutide but didn't have success. Recommends cagrilintide as a supplement rather than combining reta and tirz (which overlap in mechanism).
